headline: KeyBanc Sees Nucor (NUE) as Compelling After Recent Pullback, Upgrades Stock
summary: Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Passive Income. On June 24, KeyBanc upgraded Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) to Overweight from Sector Weight. It also set a $274 price target on the stock. The firm expects real carbon steel demand to grow 2% year over year in 2026, while […]
